title: Assertion fault on UPDATE involving two virtual tables.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE vt1 (content TEXT, id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
CREATE TABLE vt2 (comment TEXT, user_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO vt1 (content, id) VALUES ('Sample content', 1);
INSERT INTO vt2 (comment, user_id) VALUES ('User comment', 1);
UPDATE vt1 SET content = (SELECT comment FROM vt2 WHERE user_id = 1) WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: UPDATE operation on two virtual tables
